title: dungeons, animations and optimization LITE
description: A lite version of the dungeons animations and  optimization modpack
body:
!Important notice!

This modpack souly is focused on medival fantasy but you can use it as a better vanila modpack but with good fps

combat, structures, animations, textures, optimization you name it we've got it! This is a modpack specificly made for laptop players, i play on my laptop and with charging this modpack makes minecraft so much better with good fps!

This modpack adds:

better optimization ✨

more structures 🏰

more bosses 💀

more biomes 🌳

dragons 🐉

way better animations 🏃

better textures 🕶️

dungeons 🫣

better caves 🪨

more blocks 🪵

better combat ⚔️

more tools and armour 🪖

more ores 💎


the animations are crisp! combind with the fresh & smooth modpack the animations are crazy! just look!

![jumping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12ae198affd42c64dc53bee9f22c25fdfd3d3ae7_0.webp)

![crouching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a27c6c32dbd8ae6d41598bf8906114996b11a18_0.webp)

![swimming up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf0ab74104e3c920c90b3bdcd3989e9863ca1970_0.webp)

![jumping out of water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7dc62336eb506c91ca41b5514b2f4bc3e81c51_0.webp)

don't worry if you have a potato for a pc this modpack has great fps even for these animations!

dragons mod showcase:

DRagOnS leTs gO

If you like the better vanila modpack or vanila perfected but have no fps this modpack is for you! (but its even better)

This modpack souly is focused on medival fantasy adding dungdons and dragons (get the joke 👀)

also check out my old and new youtube channel!

new: @MatrixIsYourOverlord
